name: @agentdeploymentco/argus
description: Audit your Claude Code and Codex usage: tokens over time, skill/plugin/MCP-server attribution, and per-session summaries. Reads local transcripts; emits a self-contained HTML dashboard.

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --target=node --outfile=dist/index.js && mkdir -p dist/vendor && cp src/vendor/* dist/vendor/ && tail -n +2 dist/index.js > dist/index.temp && echo '#!/usr/bin/env node' | cat - dist/index.temp > dist/index.js && rm dist/index.temp && chmod +x dist/index.js
